(sha=ffdb88adebf75be510199334fef33dd1cefca77c)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds secrets-audit scanning for adjacent `openclaw.json` backup artifacts and a regression test for a `.bak` file containing a plaintext provider API key.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding from source: the PR sends backup configs through `readJsonObjectIfExists`, which uses `JSON.parse`, while current active config loading uses `parseConfigJson5`. I did not execute tests because this review was required to keep the checkout read-only.
commands.review_followup: The PR needs contributor-visible proof and a narrow parser fix before normal maintainer review can proceed; missing proof makes this a human-only merge gate rather than a repair-lane candidate.

target.title: fix(secrets): audit plaintext config backups
target.body:
## Summary
- scan adjacent OpenClaw config backup files during `openclaw secrets audit`
- report plaintext secrets left in backup config JSON with the backup file path
- add regression coverage for a `.bak` config containing a provider API key

/claim #11829

## Real behavior proof
I created a temporary OpenClaw config directory with `openclaw.json` plus an adjacent `openclaw.json.bak` containing a redacted-style test provider key, then ran the real CLI command against that setup:

```console
$ HOME=/tmp/openclaw-proof-clean-xTBrff/home OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR=/tmp/openclaw-proof-clean-xTBrff/state OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH=/tmp/openclaw-proof-clean-xTBrff/openclaw.json pnpm --silent openclaw secrets audit --json
{
  "status": "findings",
  "filesScanned": [
    "/tmp/openclaw-proof-clean-xTBrff/openclaw.json",
    "/tmp/openclaw-proof-clean-xTBrff/openclaw.json.bak"
  ],
  "summary": {
    "plaintextCount": 1,
    "unresolvedRefCount": 0,
    "shadowedRefCount": 0,
    "legacyResidueCount": 0
  },
  "findings": [
    {
      "code": "PLAINTEXT_FOUND",
      "file": "/tmp/openclaw-proof-clean-xTBrff/openclaw.json.bak",
      "jsonPath": "models.providers.openai.apiKey",
      "message": "models.providers.openai.apiKey is stored as plaintext."
    }
  ]
}
```

## Verification
- `pnpm test src/secrets/audit.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/secrets/audit.ts src/secrets/storage-scan.ts src/secrets/audit.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxlint src/secrets/audit.ts src/secrets/storage-scan.ts src/secrets/audit.test.ts`

Note: `pnpm tsgo:core:test` currently fails in unrelated browser-import tests because `esbuild` cannot be resolved in this local clone.
target.author: surim0n
